name: Instamojo
description: Instamojo — India payment gateway for MSMEs supporting UPI, cards, net banking, and EMI with storefront and subscription tools.

seo.title: Instamojo — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Instamojo: Instamojo — India payment gateway for MSMEs supporting UPI, cards, net banking, and EMI with storefront and subscription tools.

when_to_use: UPI, cards, and net banking payment gateway for Indian MSMEs
Digital storefront and payment link for Indian solo entrepreneurs
EMI and subscription billing for small Indian e-commerce sellers
Embedded payment collection for Indian creator economy platforms

pros: Native UPI and India payment rails coverage
Easy setup for MSMEs without heavy docs
Accepts net banking, EMI, and wallets
cons: API reliability complaints at peak times
review.verdict: Decent India-only gateway for micro-merchants — Razorpay generally wins on DX and reliability.
review.best_for: Indian MSMEs and solopreneurs selling digital goods or subscriptions
review.not_for: Dev teams wanting modern APIs or cross-border payments

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
